name: clauncher
flavor_texts: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.
Through controlled explosions of internal gas, it can expel water like a pistol shot. At close distances, it can shatter rock.
Its claws occasionally fall off, and it keeps a low profile until they grow back. The meat of its claws is so delicious!
It moves around by jetting water from its right pincer. It has a poor sense of balance, so it’s terrible at swimming straight.
Clauncher’s claws can fall off during battle, but they’ll regenerate. The meat inside the claws is popular as a delicacy in Galar.
By detonating gas that accumulates in its right claw, this Pokémon launches water like a bullet. This is how Clauncher defeats its enemies.
text: Clauncher is the Water Gun Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: mega-launcher. Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 53, Defense: 62, Sp. Atk: 58, Sp. Def: 63, Speed: 44. Evolution line: clauncher → clawitzer. Lore: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol. Through controlled explosions of internal gas, it can expel water like a pistol shot. At close distances, it can shatter rock. Its claws occasionally fall off, and it keeps a low profile until they grow back. The meat of its claws is so delicious! It moves around by jetting water from its right pincer. It has a poor sense of balance, so it’s terrible at swimming straight. Clauncher’s claws can fall off during battle, but they’ll regenerate. The meat inside the claws is popular as a delicacy in Galar.
